seoTitle: Beela vs Beelerup — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Beela and Beelerup. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Beela and Beelerup.
heading: Beela vs Beelerup — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Beela, Western Australia and Beelerup, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Beelerup has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Beela (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Beela or Beelerup safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Beela has a flood risk score of 59/100, while Beelerup scores 47/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Beela scores 25/100 for bushfire risk. Beelerup scores 30/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Beela or Beelerup?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Beelerup has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.43% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
